    <style>
      #loading-bg {
        position: fixed;
        inset: 0;
        background: #ffffff;
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        z-index: 99999;
        transition: opacity 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);
      }
      .loading-container {
        display: flex;
        flex-direction: column;
        align-items: center;
        width: 240px;
      }
      .loading-logo {
        width: 72px;
        margin-bottom: 48px;
        filter: drop-shadow(0 4px 12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.03));
        animation: logo-fade 2s ease-in-out infinite;
      }
      .loading-bar-track {
        width: 100%;
        height: 1px;
        background: #f1f5f9;
        position: relative;
        overflow: hidden;
      }
      .loading-bar-fill {
        position: absolute;
        width: 40%;
        height: 100%;
        background: linear-gradient(
          90deg,
          transparent,
          #d4af37,
          transparent
        ); /* Plus 金色流光 */
        animation: progress-slide 1.8s cubic-bezier(0.65, 0, 0.35, 1) infinite;
      }
      .loading-label {
        margin-top: 16px;
        font-size: 10px;
        letter-spacing: 0.3em;
        color: #94a3b8;
        text-indent: 0.3em;
      }
      @keyframes logo-fade {
        0%,
        100% {
          opacity: 0.6;
          transform: scale(0.98);
        }
        50% {
          opacity: 1;
          transform: scale(1);
        }
      }
      @keyframes progress-slide {
        0% {
          left: -40%;
        }
        100% {
          left: 100%;
        }
      }
      .loading-exit {
        opacity: 0;
        pointer-events: none;
      }
    </style>
